/usr/bin/c++ "CMakeFiles/mlir-driver.dir/src/main.cpp.o" -o mlir-driver   -L/home/shevo/LLVM-22.1.0-Linux-X64/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/shevo/LLVM-22.1.0-Linux-X64/lib /home/shevo/LLVM-22.1.0-Linux-X64/lib/libMLIRIR.a /home/shevo/LLVM-22.1.0-Linux-X64/lib/libMLIRParser.a /home/shevo/LLVM-22.1.0-Linux-X64/lib/libMLIRSupport.a /home/shevo/LLVM-22.1.0-Linux-X64/lib/libMLIRFuncDialect.a /home/shevo/LLVM-22.1.0-Linux-X64/lib/libMLIRArithDialect.a /home/shevo/LLVM-22.1.0-Linux-X64/lib/libMLIRBytecodeReader.a /home/shevo/LLVM-22.1.0-Linux-X64/lib/libMLIRAsmParser.a /home/shevo/LLVM-22.1.0-Linux-X64/lib/libMLIRControlFlowInterfaces.a /home/shevo/LLVM-22.1.0-Linux-X64/lib/libMLIRFunctionInterfaces.a /home/shevo/LLVM-22.1.0-Linux-X64/lib/libMLIRCallInterfaces.a /home/shevo/LLVM-22.1.0-Linux-X64/lib/libMLIRSideEffectInterfaces.a /home/shevo/LLVM-22.1.0-Linux-X64/lib/libMLIRInferTypeOpInterface.a /home/shevo/LLVM-22.1.0-Linux-X64/lib/libMLIRCastInterfaces.a /home/shevo/LLVM-22.1.0-Linux-X64/lib/libMLIRDialect.a /home/shevo/LLVM-22.1.0-Linux-X64/lib/libMLIRInferIntRangeCommon.a /home/shevo/LLVM-22.1.0-Linux-X64/lib/libMLIRShapedOpInterfaces.a /home/shevo/LLVM-22.1.0-Linux-X64/lib/libMLIRInferIntRangeInterface.a /home/shevo/LLVM-22.1.0-Linux-X64/lib/libMLIRUBDialect.a /home/shevo/LLVM-22.1.0-Linux-X64/lib/libMLIRIR.a /home/shevo/LLVM-22.1.0-Linux-X64/lib/libMLIRSupport.a /home/shevo/LLVM-22.1.0-Linux-X64/lib/libLLVMSupport.a -lrt -ldl -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /home/shevo/LLVM-22.1.0-Linux-X64/lib/libLLVMDemangle.a
